summary.note: Phase 1 (Ship+Sense) largely done; research+measurement loop built. NOT yet built: the drafting engine (content-creator), the auditor swarm, and the Content Executive Agent.

items.name: content-ideator
items.note: THIS pipeline — research fan-out, 7-dim scoring, strategic critique, Schedule mode, dashboard.

items.name: linkedin-analyzer
items.note: Measurement + pre-publish eval. Feeds ideator via analyzer-latest.json.

items.name: loom-walkthrough-recorder
items.note: Pre-record prep packets. v0.2 (router wiring) pending.

items.name: loom-video-analyzer
items.note: Post-record 10-pt scoring vs prep packet.

items.name: loom-to-multipost
items.note: One video -> YouTube + LinkedIn drafts. Never publishes.

items.name: youtube-packaging
items.note: Research-backed title/hook/thumbnail, no clickbait.

items.name: content-creator
items.note: THE drafting engine. Consumes ideas-latest.json, calls post_scorer.py for pre-publish eval. Biggest gap — ideator produces ideas, nothing auto-drafts them yet.

items.name: video-script-generator
items.note: Pillar+topic+duration -> full YT/Loom script. Planned Phase 1.

items.name: trend-watcher
items.note: Daily scan -> Plain-English draft queue. Planned Phase 2.

items.name: contrarian-drafter
items.note: Contrarian pillar drafts. Pillar now active manually (idea-011); skill still unbuilt.

items.name: model_router.py
items.note: Live. 5 keys set. Gemini Flash primary long-form/auditor. Logs to model_spend.json.

items.name: youtube_upload.py
items.note: OAuth2. YT1 + post-009 live.

items.name: post_scorer.py
items.note: Shared pre-publish scorer (banned words + clean paths). content-creator will reuse.

items.name: capture_queue.py
items.note: Day-3/Day-7 analytics capture queue from posts.json.

items.name: analyzer_rollup.py
items.note: ICP-weighted steering signals -> analyzer-latest.json.

items.name: build_dashboard.py
items.note: Renders this dashboard (ideas + published + schedule + skills).

items.name: headless-video pipeline
items.note: Architect's Draughting style. Drove post-009 (5:31 animated explainer).

items.name: linkedin_post.py
items.note: Direct LinkedIn API to replace Supergrow MCP. Phase 3.

items.name: x_post.py
items.note: X publishing. Phase 3. (X pillar not live yet.)

items.name: instagram_post.py
items.note: IG funny/family feed. Phase 3.

items.name: metrics_fetch.py
items.note: Auto-pull engagement -> metrics.json. Phase 1/2 (still manual paste).

items.name: clickup_client.py
items.note: Dropped 2026-05-31 — Slack DM routine covers progress visibility.

items.name: tech-stack auditor
items.note: task->model->agent spec + cost-cut suggestions. Writes the report the ideator's own-stack miner will consume. NEXT planned build.

items.name: weekly-auditor
items.note: Sunday ranking of post performance. Phase 2.

items.name: engagement-auditor
items.note: Per-post impressions/likes/saves/follows.

items.name: sentiment-auditor
items.note: Comment/DM sentiment + themes.

items.name: pillar-auditor
items.note: Which pillar wins per platform; mix-shift.

items.name: hook-auditor
items.note: Opening-hook performance ranking.

items.name: cost-auditor
items.note: $ per model/day/skill; budget burn alert.

items.name: token-auditor
items.note: Token usage per skill; prompt-slim recs.

items.name: wiki-health-auditor
items.note: Noise score, dup detection, stale flags.

items.name: audit-synthesizer
items.note: Single weekly exec brief from all auditors.

items.name: comment-responder
items.note: Drafts Setu-voice replies, approval queue. Phase 2.

items.name: dm-triage
items.note: Classify inbound DMs spam/pitch/question/lead. Phase 2.

items.name: mention-tracker
items.note: Watch @mentions across platforms. Phase 2.

items.name: lead-qualifier
items.note: Score ICP fit on flagged leads. Phase 3.

items.name: Content Executive Agent
items.note: Separate project. Daily routine, dispatches skills, collects reports, renders mobile dashboard. Phase 4 (Day 26-30). NOT started.

items.name: morning-routine
items.note: 7am: plan day, build checklist. Exec agent.

items.name: evening-report
items.note: 9pm: collect reports, audit completion, render dashboard. Exec agent.

items.name: skill-dispatcher
items.note: Routes tasks -> ContentGenerator skills. Exec agent.

items.name: report-collector
items.note: Ingests JSON reports from each skill run. Exec agent.

items.name: dashboard-renderer
items.note: Mobile HTML dashboard. Exec agent.

items.name: content-engine-bootstrap
items.note: Generic onboarding skill for new users (sister/clients). Phase 4 milestone.

items.name: dashboard-builder
items.note: Ideas/schedule/skills dashboard exists; full metrics dashboard (sparklines per pillar/platform) pending.

items.name: wiki-health-checker
items.note: Wiki ingest used ad-hoc via llm-wiki-ingest; scheduled health-check skill not built.
